title: athyrium ambiguum
intro: Athyrium ambiguum, also known as the ambiguous lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Athyrium ambiguum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
